components.caption: Material 3 defaults — colours, type and the surface-elevation strip (light).
Home palette — HA blue, Roboto Flex + Inter (light).
Minimalist palette — neutral slate, IBM Plex Sans (light).
Kiosk palette — high-contrast teal, Atkinson Hyperlegible (light).
Button card — a light entity, on (light).
Button card — a light entity, on (dark).

Tile card — the primary HA card, a light entity on (light).
Tile card — a light entity on (dark).
Gauge card — a bounded numeric reading (light).
Alarm panel card — keypad + arm states (light).
Area card — a room summary tile (light).
Sensor card — a single value read-out (light).
Vertical stack — cards stacked in a column (light).
Horizontal stack — cards side by side (light).
Grid — cards in a fixed-column grid (light).
